info.title: What is PerformancePort?
info.description: Project PP is a proprietary quantitative investment strategy designed to deliver consistent alpha by exploiting market inefficiencies through Multi-Factor Modeling and Dynamic Risk Parity. While traditional 'Buy & Hold' strategies are vulnerable to systemic drawdowns, PP utilizes a regime-switching algorithm to maximize risk-adjusted returns across various market cycles.

2: Understand how [Time Horizon](/timehor) and investor risk profile shape allocation models
3: See how [Market Cycles](/market) drives investments allocation
4: Stay informed with a coincise [Economic Overview](/ecoview) - see at a glance what drives our macro allocation
5: Discover the current [Market Phase](/marketphase) and how it drives [Macro Asset Allocation](/macroall) across risk profiles
6: Access [Leading Equity Markets Allocation](/equitystrat) - built from a selection of top index constituents, dynamically adjusted each month and benchmarked against their reference indices
